bucket.description: Bucket name for GCS or S3 backend. Required when type is `gcs` or `s3`.

prefix.description: Path prefix for remote storage (e.g. `my-project/nagi`). When set, all remote paths are prefixed with this value. Ignored for the local backend.

region.description: AWS region for S3 backend (e.g. `us-east-1`). Required when type is `s3`.

type.description: Backend type identifier. One of `local`, `gcs`, `s3`. Defaults to `local`.

ExportConfig.description: Configuration for exporting logs to a remote DWH.

connection.description: Reference to a `kind: Connection` resource name.

dataset.description: DWH dataset (BigQuery) or schema (Snowflake) to export into.

interval.description: Condition evaluation interval and export throttling threshold.

slack.description: Slack notification settings. When set, notifications are sent to the specified channel.

channel.description: Slack channel to send notifications to (e.g. `#nagi-alerts`).

export.description: Log export configuration. When set, compile generates export Assets and logs are transferred to the remote DWH.

lockRetryIntervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds between lock acquisition retry attempts. Defaults to 900 (15 minutes).

lockRetryMaxAttempts.description: Maximum number of lock acquisition retry attempts before skipping. Defaults to 3.

lockTtlSeconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds for sync lock files. Locks expire after this duration, preventing deadlocks from abnormal process termination. Defaults to 3600 (1 hour).

maxControllers.description: Maximum number of Controllers to run in parallel during `nagi serve`. When the number of connected components exceeds this limit, serve exits with an error. When omitted, one Controller is created per connected component.

maxEvaluateConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent evaluate tasks per Controller. When omitted, no limit is applied.

maxSyncConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent sync tasks per Controller. When omitted, no limit is applied.

nagiDir.description: Base directory for Nagi state (logs, cache, locks, etc.). Defaults to `~/.nagi`.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for in-flight sync tasks to finish during shutdown. When omitted, waits indefinitely.
